Notes_

Ideas of Algebra | Ideas of Analysis | Ideas of Geometry In Progress...|

$$\huge TM\oplus T^*M$$

Exposition X Sci. Com X Teaching_

Ideas of Quantum Field Theory In Progress...|

Exposition X Sci. Com X Teaching_

Gauge Field Geometry. In progress...|

Semester & Summer Project_

An exposition presenting the geometric foundations of gauge theory and relate them to the physical theories of electromagnetism, Yang-Mills, and gneral relativity. We also outline their influence on low-dimensional topology, particularly through their connections to Knot theory and four-manifold invariants.

Differential Geometry.

Lecture Notes_

Lecture notes on manifolds, tangent spaces, submanifolds, vector bundles, vector fields, differential forms, integration on manifolds and Stokes' theorem.

AdS/CFT Correspondence.

Master's Thesis_

Studied Riemannian geometry, AdS geometry, structure of 2d CFTs, and their connections.Computed boundary CFT correlation functions via bulk AdS gravity using two equivalent AdS/CFT prescriptions. Related Fefferman & Graham conformal invariants (the ambient metric framework) to some formal aspects of conformal boundary in AdS/CFT.

Energy Transfer in Electric Circuits.

Semester Project_

Built a 39m long transmission-line model to demonstrate the artefacts of a field-based (Poynting vector) energy transfer. Recorded nanosecond level voltage steps (40-140ns) across the load using a GHz oscilloscope.

Finite Difference Methods.

Semester Project_

Implemented finite difference methods for PDEs, including the schemes of Gauss-Seidel, SOR, andMultigrid to improve convergence. Demonstrated these methods on a Laplace equation with specified boundary constraints.

Art $\times$ Science
